Home.howItWorksSubtitle: From browsing to doorstep in four easy steps — no account required for your first order.

Home.step3Desc: Pay on delivery in cash, or online with card or InstaPay.

About.aboutDescription: 2M Premium Pharmacy was founded with a single mission: give every Egyptian access to authentic, premium health and wellness products — with the trust and expertise of a real pharmacy, delivered to your door.
About.val1Desc: Every product sourced from authorized distributors. Zero compromises on quality.
About.val2Desc: Our pharmacists hand-pick every product category for efficacy and safety.
About.val3Desc: Egypt-wide delivery to all 27 governorates. 2–5 business days to your door.
About.val4Desc: Your health and satisfaction drive every decision we make.
About.val5Desc: 10,000+ satisfied customers who trust us for their wellness journey.
About.val6Desc: International brands, globally certified, at competitive Egyptian prices.
About.guaranteeDesc: Every product on 2M Premium Pharmacy is sourced directly from official, authorized distributors. We don't cut corners — ever.
About.guaranteeItem5: No grey market or unauthorized imports
About.guaranteeCardDesc: Not satisfied with the authenticity of a product? Contact us and we'll make it right — full refund, no questions asked.

Contact.counselDesc: Questions about premium products, nationwide delivery, or your order status? Our dedicated team is available 6 days a week.
Contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you via email within 24 business hours. For instant support, we recommend the Priority Advisory Desk.
Contact.whatsappSupportDesc: Direct advisory with licensed medical professionals for custom solutions
Contact.whatsappHotlineDesc: For instant tracking support, private formulary status, or specialized queries, open an advisory request.

Faqs.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering, delivery, payments, and returns. Can't find your answer?
Faqs.teamAvailable: Our team is available Sat–Thu, 9am–9pm Cairo time.
Faqs.q_0_0: Are all products on 2M Premium Pharmacy authentic?
Faqs.a_0_0: Yes, 100%. Every product is sourced directly from authorized distributors. We have zero tolerance for counterfeit or grey market products.
Faqs.q_0_1: How do I know which product is right for me?
Faqs.a_0_1: You can use our search to find products by health goal or ingredient. For personalized advice, contact our formulation concierge.
Faqs.a_0_2: Yes! Click 'Notify Me' on any out-of-stock product and we'll alert you via email or WhatsApp as soon as it's back.
Faqs.q_0_3: Do you carry Egyptian and international brands?
Faqs.a_0_3: Yes. We carry both local Egyptian brands and top international brands including Now Foods, Nordic Naturals, The Ordinary, Optimum Nutrition, and more.
Faqs.q_1_0: Do you deliver across all of Egypt?
Faqs.a_1_0: Yes! We deliver to all 27 Egyptian governorates. Delivery time is typically 2–5 business days. Cairo and Giza may be faster.
Faqs.a_1_1: Orders above EGP 500 receive FREE delivery. A flat delivery fee applies to orders below this threshold.
Faqs.q_1_2: How can I track my order?
Faqs.a_1_2: Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a SMS/Email notification with tracking details and an estimated delivery time.
Faqs.a_1_3: Delivery operates Saturday through Thursday. Friday deliveries may be available in some areas — check with concierge to confirm.
Faqs.q_2_0: What payment methods do you accept?
Faqs.a_2_0: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), Visa, Mastercard, and InstaPay. Select your preferred method at checkout.
Faqs.q_2_1: Is Cash on Delivery available everywhere?
Faqs.a_2_1: Yes! COD is available for all Egyptian governorates. You pay the exact amount shown at checkout when the order arrives.
Faqs.a_2_2: Yes. All card payments are processed through an encrypted, PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway. We never store your card details.
Faqs.a_2_3: Never. The price you see at checkout (including any delivery fee) is the final amount you pay. No surprises.
Faqs.a_3_0: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unopened products in original condition. Damaged or wrong items can be returned immediately.
Faqs.q_3_1: How do I return a product?
Faqs.a_3_1: Submit a request to our Concierge Desk with your order number. We will coordinate a premium return pickup and process your refund.
Faqs.a_3_2: Refunds are processed within 3–5 business days after we receive the returned product. COD refunds are issued via bank transfer or InstaPay.
Faqs.a_3_3: Opened products can only be returned if they are defective or damaged. For health and safety reasons, opened supplements and medicines cannot be returned if changed your mind.
